name: AutoMem
description: Persistent graph-vector memory backed by an AutoMem service.

endpoint.label: Endpoint
endpoint.help: Base URL for the AutoMem service.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Optional bearer token for authenticated AutoMem deployments.

autoRecall.label: Auto Recall
autoRecall.help: Recall relevant memories before a new agent turn.

exposure.label: Exposure
exposure.help: Limit auto-recall to DMs/private contexts by default.

defaultTags.label: Default Tags
defaultTags.help: Project tags to apply when the request does not supply tags.
